query: SELECT at.id, at.instanceId, at.stageId, at.assignedTo, at.status, u.name as userName FROM approvalTasks at LEFT JOIN users u ON at.assignedTo = u.id WHERE (at.instanceId, at.stageId, at.assignedTo) IN (SELECT instanceId, stageId, assignedTo FROM approvalTasks GROUP BY instanceId, stageId, assignedTo HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) ORDER BY at.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user BsRQq1X2Mh9kZmK.6749932367bb --database WqXabcMRQ5aEFJ4QyeefuN --execute SELECT at.id, at.instanceId, at.stageId, at.assignedTo, at.status, u.name as userName FROM approvalTasks at LEFT JOIN users u ON at.assignedTo = u.id WHERE (at.instanceId, at.stageId, at.assignedTo) IN (SELECT instanceId, stageId, assignedTo FROM approvalTasks GROUP BY instanceId, stageId, assignedTo HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) ORDER BY at.id;
